positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    sells_more_than_one_million(zelda)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    top10(zelda)).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~top10(fifa22)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~made_by(fifa22,X0) | ~japanese(X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    made_by(zelda,sK0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    made_by(X0,sK1(X0)) | ~top10(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    japanese(sK0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~sells_more_than_one_million(X0) | top10(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    japanese(sK1(X0)) | ~top10(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    zelda != fifa22).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u17,axiom,
    zelda != fifa22).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define sells_more_than_one_million(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define top10(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define japanese(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define made_by(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
